nonBlockingIssues.description: The feed page has a React Hook useEffect with missing dependency 'fetchSignals'. Should either include it in the dependency array or refactor to remove the warning.
Unused imports (DBNotification, markNotificationRead, getUnreadNotificationCount) in notifications/route.ts should be cleaned up to reduce lint warnings.
SEED_SIGNALS constant (empty array) and DEFAULT_PRICES (empty object) are now unused after removing hardcoded data. Can be removed in future cleanup.

appliedUpdates.description: Added table schemas for watchlist, notifications, user_settings, and signals with deduplication constraint. Documented all new API routes (watchlist, notifications, feed). Added design patterns section covering multi-tenancy, signal deduplication, staggered delivery, ticker validation, and notification polling.

summary: All validators passed (typecheck, lint). All 3 implementation features reviewed and passed. Features implemented: per-user watchlist CRUD, per-user signal pipeline with watchlist-based detection, and in-app notifications with staggered delivery + feed pagination. Only minor lint warnings remain (unused variables, missing useEffect dependency) - no blocking issues. Documentation updated in architecture.md with table schemas, API routes, and design patterns.
nextSteps: User testing validator will run automated tests against validation contract assertions
